title: Cobblemon Interface [Berry Pouch]
description: Berry Pouch GUI in Cobblemon Interface style.
body:
This resource pack changes the default interface of the [Berry Pouch](https://modrinth.com/mod/berry-pouch) mod, giving it style and atmosphere [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface).

Now managing berries feels smoother and more stylish — the Berry Pouch interface blends seamlessly with the Cobblemon Interface design.

🎨 All original ideas and visual style of Cobblemon Interface belong to [VinnyStalck](https://modrinth.com/user/VinnyStalck).

🍓 Mod Berry Pouch created by [Thirace](https://modrinth.com/user/Thirace), [Andromeda-Galaxy29](https://modrinth.com/user/Andromeda-Galaxy29), [Flandre923-Unit-01](https://modrinth.com/user/Flandre923-Unit-01).

### Important

Support for this resource pack will cease if [Cobblemon Interface Modded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface-modded) starts supporting the Berry Pouch mod.
